scope: zero-training qualification of the H0 occupational carrier records for an exact count-constrained assignment Gate

source.dataset: qualified H0-E-v4 O1 occupational occurrence census

scientific_contract.composition_role: C is a sampled upstream variable; observed C may be used only in the oracle-C conditional qualification and must be labelled as such
scientific_contract.site_assignment_role: target-only output used in quotient NLL and accuracy, never an input feature
scientific_contract.parent_action_role: species-free carrier symmetry and quotient measure
scientific_contract.child_space_group_role: target-derived audit metadata and prohibited model input
scientific_contract.occupation_class_role: target-derived reconstruction label and prohibited model input

decision_rule.pass: freeze a separately versioned oracle-C assignment Q1 using only species-free carrier features and exact parent-action quotient NLL
decision_rule.fail: repair the carrier/data interface only; do not train assignment, L1, or M1
decision_rule.boundary: This audit cannot pass assignment Q1, L1, M1, free joint H1a, tensor/oracle work, relaxation, DFT, or DFPT.
